vocab.meaning: một góc nhỏ khuất và riêng tư
vocab.example: I usually hunt for a secluded alcove in the university library where I can hide away from the hustle and bustle.

vocab.meaning: sự kích thích về mặt trí tuệ
vocab.example: Studying in a trendy co-working space provides the intellectual stimulation I need to stay motivated during complex projects.

vocab.meaning: có lợi/tạo điều kiện cho việc làm việc sâu và tập trung
vocab.example: The silent floor of the archives is incredibly conducive to deep work, as even the sound of a page turning is rare.

vocab.meaning: thẩm mỹ tối giản (ít chi tiết gây xao nhãng)
vocab.example: My home office follows a minimalist aesthetic, which helps clear my mental fog and sharpen my concentration.

vocab.meaning: độ sáng tự nhiên (ánh sáng mặt trời)
vocab.example: I prefer the local cafe primarily for its natural luminosity, as the large floor-to-ceiling windows prevent me from feeling drowsy.

vocab.meaning: được sắp xếp một cách tỉ mỉ/ngăn nắp
vocab.example: Having a meticulously organized study desk is half the battle won when it comes to tackling a heavy syllabus.

vocab.meaning: sự yên tĩnh tuyệt đối (như trong tu viện)
vocab.example: I find that I require monastic silence to fully grasp advanced mathematical concepts; even white noise can be a hindrance.
The sight of other students engrossed in their books at a bookstore cafe always helps to spur my own productivity.

vocab.meaning: những khoảng thời gian dài không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: I retreat to a quiet study carrel to ensure I have uninterrupted blocks of time for my dissertation research.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí thanh bình/tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: The serene ambiance of the botanical gardens makes it an underrated spot for revising literature or history.
